address.address1: 17-24, Jl. Teuku Nyak Arief, Banda Aceh, 23114

description.short: Capital O 854 Ub Caisar Hotel sits in vibrant Banda Aceh, close to museums, mosques, tsunami memorials and bustling seafood-lined waterfronts. Ideal for two travelers seeking comfort and convenience, the hotel offers air-conditioned rooms with free Wi‑Fi, complimentary bottled water, bright showers and premium toiletries; select rooms provide sweeping city views. Dining is effortless with a full restaurant, staffed kitchen for bespoke meals and seamless delivery, plus a stylish bar and on-demand room service. A convenient base for exploring Aceh’s heritage and coastline. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

Terima kasih atas ulasan Anda yang luar biasa! Kami senang mendengar bahwa Capital O 854 Ub Caisar Hotel adalah pilihan yang tepat untuk liburan keluarga Anda, dengan kamar yang luas, fasilitas yang baik, serta AC dan pemanas yang nyaman.

comments.reviewComments:
Online booking, Disadvantages
- Successfully booked online and paid through Agoda, but upon check-in it was full and I had to add 50 thousand for a room upgrade.
- DID NOT RECEIVE towels
- DID NOT RECEIVE soap, toothpaste

Advantages
- Cheaper price for online booking, but since I was asked to add another 50 thousand, the price ended up being the same.

Pesan online, Kekurangan

- TIDAK DAPAT handuk
- TIDAK DAPAT sabun mandi, odol

Kelebihan
- Harga lebih murah pesan online, tp krn diminta tambah lagi 50 ribu jadi sama aja harganya.
